mnemonics.title: CAP Choices
mnemonics.content: CAP Theorem: Choose 2 - CAke (Consistency+Availability) can't be Partitioned

mnemonics.title: Failure Types
mnemonics.content: B.C.O.T - Byzantine, Crash-stop, Omission, Timing failures

acronyms.usage: Fundamental trade-offs in distributed systems design

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a large system split by scissors cutting network cables

analogies.analogy: Like traitorous army captains sending conflicting battle plans
